name: Kali Metals Limited
description: Kali Metals Limited is an Australian-based exploration company with a significant portfolio of assets across the Higginsville Lithium District, the Pilbara region, and the Southern Lachlan Fold Belt. With an exploration tenure covering approximately 3,960 square kilometers, the company focuses on identifying and developing high-quality lithium, gold, tin, and other critical mineral resources. Kali Metals is managed by a team of experienced professionals dedicated to exploring highly prospective tenements and strategically expanding their asset portfolio to support the global transition toward clean energy.
